footer.blurb: A small sanctuary for deep rest in Písac, Sacred Valley.

1.desc: Massage, breath and bodywork that treat you as one whole — never parts.

2.desc: One-to-one guidance to untangle the mind and walk your path with intention.

3.desc: Slow, grounded practice at altitude — strength for the trail, stillness for the rest.

4.desc: Days of ceremony, silence and valley walks — small groups, deep rest.

5.desc: Tools and rituals to carry the valley's calm into everyday life.

hero.sub: Massage, movement and mentorship in the heart of the Sacred Valley — five paths, one practice: coming home to yourself, three thousand metres closer to the sky.

mission.title: Munay means love in Quechua.
mission.body: It is the heart-energy at the centre of Andean cosmovision — and the centre of this practice. Every session is a slow ritual: warm oils pressed from valley plants, palo santo smoke, and hands that listen before they work. Nothing is rushed. Nothing is routine.

t1.blurb: Volcanic stones warmed in spring water melt tension layer by layer, like sun on mountain ice.

t2.blurb: Muña, eucalyptus and lavender blended to your mood — breathed in, worked warm and deep into the skin.

t3.blurb: Gentle, intuitive energy work to settle the mind and let the body's own current flow again.

escape.title: Let the valley hold you.
escape.sub: One unhurried hour can change the shape of a whole journey.

testimonial.quote: “I arrived with a backpack full of tension and left feeling like the mountains had carried it away. The most present, intuitive massage I have found anywhere in the world.”
testimonial.name: Maya · Berlin

cta.title: Your body knows the way.
cta.sub: Reserve your session — mornings and sunsets fill quickly.

hero.title: A practice of presence
hero.sub: A small sanctuary above the Písac market, built on one belief: healing begins the moment you feel safe enough to soften.

phil.title: The whole of you, welcome here.
phil.b1: We don't treat backs, necks or shoulders — we welcome whole people. Tiredness, altitude, grief, joy, the long road that brought you here: all of it comes onto the table with you, and all of it is listened to.
phil.b2: Sessions blend slow Swedish strokes, Andean energy work and breath — guided less by routine than by what your body asks for on the day.

story.title: Hands shaped by two worlds
story.body: Trained in classical massage and apprenticed with curanderos of the valley, your practitioner has spent the last decade learning one lesson again and again: the body heals at the speed of trust. (Placeholder story — replace with the real one.)

oils.title: Oils, smoke & warm hands
oils.b1: Every session opens with palo santo and closes with coca-leaf tea. Between them: oils warmed over a candle and blended for you that morning.

oil1.name: Muña
oil1.desc: Wild Andean mint; opens the breath at altitude.

oil2.name: Eucalyptus
oil2.desc: Clears the head, cools tired muscles.

oil3.name: Lavender
oil3.desc: Quiets the nervous system into rest.

oil4.name: Palo Santo
oil4.desc: Sacred wood smoke to mark beginnings and endings.

valley.title: Písac, 2,970 m above the noise
valley.body: Písac sits where eucalyptus air, river sound and the Apus — the mountain spirits — do half the work before we even begin. Step out of your session into terraced hills and the slow rhythm of the valley.

cta.title: Come as you are.
cta.sub: Sessions by appointment, every day except Monday.

hero.title: Choose your medicine
hero.sub: Five rituals, one intention: to return you to yourself. Every session includes palo santo, warm oils and coca-leaf tea.

t1.name: Andean Hot Stone
t1.desc: Volcanic stones warmed in spring water are drawn along the body's meridians, melting deep tension layer by layer. Heat does what pressure alone cannot.

t2.name: Holistic Full-Body Relaxation
t2.desc: Long, slow, full-body strokes that lower the heart rate and quiet the mind — the classic deep rest, done with unusual patience.

t3.name: Aromatherapy Oil Massage
t3.desc: A blend of muña, eucalyptus and lavender chosen with you before we begin — breathed in, then worked warm and deep into the skin.

t4.name: Deep Tissue / Therapeutic
t4.desc: Focused, deliberate work on what hurts — old knots, trekking legs, desk-bound shoulders. Strong, never rushed, always in conversation with you.

t5.name: Chakra & Energy Balancing
t5.desc: Gentle, intuitive energy work along the body's centres, woven with breath and stillness, to let your own current flow again.

cta.title: Not sure which to choose?
cta.sub: Tell us how you feel — we'll listen and shape the session around you.

hero.title: Find your way to us
hero.sub: Two streets above the Písac market, behind the blue door. Come early, leave slowly.

visit.title: Visit
visit.body: Calle [XXX] s/n, Písac, Valle Sagrado, Cusco — Peru

wa.title: The fastest way
wa.body: Message us on WhatsApp to book a session or ask anything at all.
